source_name: Code4rena Wise Lending Findings & Analysis Report (2024-02)
finding_title: Current heartbeat implementation may lead to a prolonged DoS for Chainlink Oracles
summary: Wise Lending 通过 recalibrate/heartbeat 逻辑判断 Chainlink 是否死亡；攻击者可使 oracle 在较长时间内被判定不可用，影响借贷、提现、清算等所有依赖价格路径。
root_cause: oracle heartbeat calibration can be externally driven into a state where valid feeds are treated as dead for an extended period
broken_invariants: oracle liveness checks must not be griefable into disabling an otherwise valid market
borrow, withdraw, and liquidation availability must not depend on attacker-triggerable heartbeat miscalibration
attack_preconditions: 价格路径依赖 heartbeat/liveness check
recalibrate 或等价校准入口可被非可信主体触发，或可在不安全时机执行
attacker_capability: external caller able to trigger oracle recalibration/liveness update at adversarial timing

impact.description: affected market operations revert, potentially delaying liquidation and increasing bad-debt risk

why_not_higher: 主要为 oracle availability/market DoS；直接坏账需要配合价格剧烈变动或清算窗口错失。
why_not_lower: 价格不可用会阻塞核心借贷与清算路径，不只是单用户 inconvenience。
common_false_positive_angles: 若校准入口 trusted-only 且操作流程保证安全时机，则攻击面较小
若 consumer 有 fallback oracle 或 bounded stale mode，则影响降低
mitigations: 使用 oracle 原生 heartbeat 或可信治理设置；限制 recalibrate 权限并避免在会造成 DoS 的状态下更新 heartbeat。
trigger_actions: call recalibrate when feed timing makes heartbeat overly strict or stale
cause subsequent oracle reads to revert as dead for a prolonged interval
